children.text: Welcome! Lets take a few seconds to get a few of the basics setup.
Tap next at any time, you can easily change this information later, everything is optional.
Information about your business will appear on each invoice.
Optionally setup a logo to appear on each invoice.
You've got the basics setup now, go ahead and create your first invoice!
Tell us a bit about your business to help guide future app improvements!
With Invoice Simple, your customers can pay you by credit card, in person or online, and the money is deposited into your bank account.
